## Outcome

Describe the user decision or workflow improved by this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:copy`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant browser and responsive tests

## Design QA gate

Required for every new page, material redesign or new workflow state. Review [the Design QA checklist](../docs/design-qa-checklist.md).

- [ ] Cards have sufficient internal padding.
- [ ] Non-decision-useful explanatory text has been removed.
- [ ] There is one visually dominant primary action.
- [ ] The first point of attention is obvious.
- [ ] Colour is limited to meaningful workflow and evidence states.
- [ ] The page answers one clear decision.
- [ ] The interface feels like investor software, not software explaining itself.
- [ ] I would show this screenshot to a senior investment professional without qualification.
- [ ] Responsive and print states have been checked where applicable.

If any item is unchecked, the page is not complete. Explain any accepted exception below.

## Evidence and screenshots

Add desktop, tablet and mobile evidence for visual changes.

## Exceptions

None.
